sentences.arabic: تَعْتَبِرُ النِّيَّةُ الصَّادِقَةُ أَسَاسَ قَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ، فَلَا يَنْفَعُ عَمَلٌ ظَاهِرٌ إِلَّا إِذَا كَانَ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِ اللهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Iskrena namjera se smatra osnovom primanja djela u islamu, jer vanjsko djelo ne koristi osim ako nije učinjeno isključivo u ime Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Sincere intention is considered the foundation for the acceptance of deeds in Islam, as an outward action is of no avail unless it is performed purely for the sake of Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ جَاءَ فِي الْحَدِيثِ الشَّرِيفِ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ، رَقْمُ ١].
sentences.translation: U časnom hadisu se navodi: 'Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je nanijetio' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave, br. 1].
sentences.translationEn: It was mentioned in the noble hadith: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every person shall have only that which he intended' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation, No. 1].

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ الْعُلَمَاءُ مِثْلُ ابْنِ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الْإِخْلَاصَ هُوَ رُوحُ الْعِبَادَةِ وَلُبُّهَا، وَبِدُونِهِ يُصْبِحُ الْعَمَلُ كَجَسَدٍ بِلَا رُوحٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci poput Ibn al-Qayyima naglašavaju da je ihlas (iskrenost) duh i srž ibadeta, a bez njega djelo postaje poput tijela bez duše.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars such as Ibn al-Qayyim emphasize that sincerity (Ikhlas) is the soul and essence of worship, and without it, a deed becomes like a body without a soul.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يُرَاقِبَ قَلْبَهُ قَبْلَ كُلِّ قَوْلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ لِيَتَأَكَّدَ مِنْ سَلَامَةِ مَقْصِدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga musliman mora preispitivati svoje srce prije svakog govora ili postupka kako bi se uvjerio u ispravnost svog cilja.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, a Muslim must monitor his heart before every word or action to ensure the integrity of his purpose.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَصْحِيحَ النِّيَّةِ لَيْسَ أَمْرًا سَهْلًا، بَلْ يَتَطَلَّبُ جِهَادًا مُسْتَمِرًّا لِلنَّفْسِ لِتَجَنُّبِ الرِّيَاءِ وَطَلَبِ السُُّمْعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Popravljanje namjere nije laka stvar, već zahtijeva neprestanu borbu sa samim sobom radi izbjegavanja pretvaranja i traženja ugleda.
sentences.translationEn: Correcting one's intention is not an easy task; rather, it requires constant striving against the self to avoid ostentation and seeking a reputation.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي النِّهَايَةِ، يَنَالُ الْمُؤْمِنُ الْأَجْرَ عَلَى قَدْرِ صِدْقِهِ مَعَ خَالِقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, vjernik dobija nagradu srazmjerno svojoj iskrenosti prema Stvoritelju.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, the believer receives a reward proportional to his sincerity with his Creator.
